title: k6 Enterprise Framework — Test Configuration Schema
description: Schema for test configuration files (JSON or YAML) consumed by config-loader.ts

description.description: Optional longer description of what the test validates

profile.description: Load profile to apply (maps to shared/profiles/<name>.json)

client.description: Client directory name under clients/ (alphanumeric, dash, underscore)

script.description: Path to scenario script relative to clients/<client>/scenarios/ (no extension)

tags.description: Custom tags applied to all metrics (merged with profile defaults)

thresholds.description: Threshold overrides (merged with profile defaults, scenario wins)

options.description: Raw k6 options to merge (use sparingly — prefer profile-based configuration)
